message:
fix(lint): Correct type comparisons and idiomatic patterns

terminal/raw.rs:
- Remove unnecessary "as usize" cast on NCCS constant; libc types
  already match on this platform

unicode/bidi.rs:
- Replace .iter().any(|&l| l == N) with .contains(&N) for level checks
- More idiomatic and clearer intent

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
